### What's missing

Describe the endpoint, option, or behavior you'd like. If it maps to a
specific Audiobookshelf API route, link the
[API docs](https://api.audiobookshelf.org/) entry.

### Use case

What are you trying to build? This helps shape the right API.

### Proposed shape (optional)

A sketch of the method signature or usage you have in mind:

```go
// ...
```

### Alternatives

Anything you've tried, including the generic `Get`/`Post`/… escape hatches.
